CustomField.description: Sprint 58 - CRM-269 Vilogia Création BT depuis le CRM
CustomField.formula: IF(RIGHT(Asset.TECH_PhenixAssetId__c, 5)="15-10", "15-10-115-102", IF(RIGHT(Asset.TECH_PhenixAssetId__c, 5)="15-29", "15-29-118-102", IF(RIGHT(Asset.TECH_PhenixAssetId__c, 5)="15-15", "15-15-116-102", IF(RIGHT(Asset.TECH_PhenixAssetId__c, 5)="15-28", "15-28-117-102", IF(RIGHT(Asset.TECH_PhenixAssetId__c, 5)="15-31", "15-31-120-102", IF(RIGHT(Asset.TECH_PhenixAssetId__c, 5)="15-30", "15-30-119-102", IF(RIGHT(Asset.TECH_PhenixAssetId__c, 5)="15-33", "15-33-135-79", IF(RIGHT(Asset.TECH_PhenixAssetId__c, 5)="15-34", "15-34-136-79", IF(RIGHT(Asset.TECH_PhenixAssetId__c, 5)="18-10", "18-10-115-102", IF(RIGHT(Asset.TECH_PhenixAssetId__c, 5)="18-15", "18-15-116-102", "15-00-000-000"))))))))))
CustomField.label: MCS_CodeNature
